data.title: Tesla, SpaceX, And X: How Musk's Companies Could Cash In On A Trump Presidency
Honda Open To Reviving Nissan Merger Talks If CEO Uchida Steps Down, Creating Fourth-Largest Global Automaker
data.description: Honda Motor Co. is willing to resume merger negotiations with Nissan Motor Co. if CEO Makoto Uchida steps down.

data.title: LIBRA Memecoin Shoots Up 18% After Argentine President Javier Milei Reposts Message On 'How To Buy' The Token
data.description: LIBRA, the controversial meme coin initially promoted by Argentina President Javier Milei, dramatically surged Monday in response to the leader reposting the token's purchase tutorial on X.

data.title: Elon Musk Will Unleash Grok 3 Tonight: Tesla Integration, Live-Voice Mode, And More — Here's What To Expect
data.description: Elon Musk's xAI is set to launch Grok 3 tonight, introducing major upgrades like Tesla integration, live-voice mode, and self-correcting AI capabilities in a highly anticipated live demo.

data.title: Elon Musk Has A Frosty Relationship With Dad Errol But Last Year Gifted Him A Luxury Car That Was Surprisingly Not A Tesla — Here's Why
data.description: Despite their rocky relationship, Elon Musk gifted his father, Errol Musk, a Bentley Flying Spur last year instead of a Tesla, while also providing financial support to family members.
